mapper.insert:
insert into pm_project_maintenance (id, projectId, projectCode, projectName, projectType, projectExecutionState, contractNo, officeCode, type, category, subCategory, processTime, compId, processDesc, processStep, remainProblem, transitHour, processHour, itemModel, softVersion, enabledFeatures, customTos, customCcs, hasReport, quesnaireId, deliverFileIds, remark, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy, warrantyStatus, industryName, userOffice, year, quarter, month, wsCount, wafCount, wsYearCount, wafYearCount, warrantyInfo , customInfo ) values (#{id}, #{projectId}, #{projectCode}, #{projectName}, #{projectType}, #{projectExecutionState}, #{contractNo}, #{officeCode}, #{type}, #{category}, #{subCategory}, #{processTime}, #{compId}, #{processDesc}, #{processStep}, #{remainProblem}, #{transitHour}, #{processHour}, #{itemModel}, #{softVersion}, #{enabledFeatures}, #{customTos}, #{customCcs}, #{hasReport}, #{quesnaireId}, #{deliverFileIds}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{createBy}, #{updateTime}, #{updateBy}, #{warrantyStatus}, #{industryName}, #{userOffice}, #{year}, #{quarter}, #{month}, #{wsCount}, #{wafCount}, #{wsYearCount}, #{wafYearCount}, #{warrantyInfo}, #{serviceInfo} , #{customInfo} )
SELECT last_insert_id() as id ;
mapper.select:
SELECT m.*, d.`departmentName` AS officeName, d2.`departmentName` AS userOfficeName, sm.`memberName` as serviceManager, pm.`memberName` as programManagerA, pm2.`memberName` as programManagerB, IFNULL( CONCAT(m.createBy, "-", ui.realName), m.createBy ) AS createUser, bd.`basicDataName` AS typeName, bd3.`basicDataName` AS projectExecutionStateName, CONCAT(IF(m.projectType = 40, '自定义', ''), bd1.`basicDataName`) AS categoryName, bd2.`basicDataName` AS subCategoryName, IFNULL(ph.column004, prh.`marketName`) AS marketName, IFNULL(ph.column005, prh.`systemName`) AS systemName, IFNULL(ph.column006, prh.`expendName`) AS expendName, IFNULL(m.industryName, IFNULL(ph.column007, prh.`industryName`)) AS industryName, ph.column013 AS finalCustomerName, IFNULL(prh.salesman, CONCAT( s.`memberCode`, "-", REPLACE( s.`memberName`, CONCAT(s.`memberCode`, "-"), "" ) ) ) AS salerName, c.name AS companyName, c.abbr as companyAbbr <if test=" property="projectMaintenance.hideQuesnaire" compareValue="true" prepend=","> qrt.*
<if test=" hideFiles compareValue="true" prepend=",">
pd.deliverFiles, pd.deliverTypes
<if test=" hideWarranty compareValue="true" prepend=",">
IFNULL(wcs.warrantyStatus, m.warrantyStatus) as warrantyStatus , CASE WHEN IFNULL(SUM(DISTINCT wcs.warrantyStatus), m.warrantyStatus) = - 1 THEN '维保内' ELSE CASE WHEN IFNULL(SUM(DISTINCT wcs.warrantyStatus), m.warrantyStatus) = 0 THEN '部分保外' ELSE CASE WHEN IFNULL(SUM(DISTINCT wcs.warrantyStatus), m.warrantyStatus) = 1 THEN '维保外' ELSE NULL END END END AS warrantyStatusName , wcs.warrantyGrade , wcs.warrantyGradeName , wcs.wafService , wcs.wafServiceName
FROM pm_project_maintenance m LEFT JOIN pm_project_header ph ON m.`projectId` = ph.`projectId` AND m.`projectType` = "10" LEFT JOIN pm_presales_project_header prh ON m.`projectId` = prh.`presalesId` AND m.`projectType` = "20" LEFT JOIN pm_project_member sm ON m.`projectId` = sm.`projectId` AND m.`projectType` = sm.`projectType` AND sm.`memberRole` = '20' AND sm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND sm.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm ON m.`projectId` = pm.`projectId` AND m.`projectType` = pm.`projectType` AND pm.`memberRole` = '30' AND pm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND pm.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm2 ON m.`projectId` = pm2.`projectId` AND m.`projectType` = pm2.`projectType` AND pm2.`memberRole` = '30' AND pm2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND pm2.`fromFlag` = 2 LEFT JOIN `pm_project_member` s ON s.`projectId` = m.`projectId` AND s.`projectType` = m.`projectType` AND m.`projectType` = "10" AND s.`memberRole` = "10" AND s.`effectiveTo` IS NULL <if test=" property="projectMaintenance.hideQuesnaire" compareValue="true"> LEFT JOIN projectMaintenance_tempQuesnaireResultTable qrt ON qrt.quesnaireResultHeaderId = m.`quesnaireId`
<if test=" hideFiles compareValue="true">
LEFT JOIN (select projectId, projectType, GROUP_CONCAT( CONCAT(pd.`deliverablePath`, "$$", pd.`deliverableName`) SEPARATOR "||" ) AS deliverFiles, GROUP_CONCAT(pd.`deliverableType` SEPARATOR " | ") AS deliverTypes from pm_basic_deliver_detail pd where now() < IFNULL(pd.effectiveTo, "9999-12-30") group by projectId, projectType) pd ON pd.projectId = m.id AND pd.projectType = m.projectType + 1
<if test=" hideWarranty compareValue="true">
LEFT JOIN temp_project_warranty_state wcs ON m.`projectId` = wcs.projectId AND m.projectType = 10
LEFT JOIN `fnd_user_info` ui ON ui.`username` = m.`createBy` LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd ON bd.`basicDataId` = m.`type` AND bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'maintenanceType' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd1 ON bd1.`basicDataId` = m.`category` AND bd1.`dataTypeCode` = 'maintenanceCategory' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd2 ON bd2.`basicDataId` = m.`subCategory` AND bd2.`dataTypeCode` = 'maintenanceSubCategory' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd3 ON bd3.`basicDataId` = m.`projectExecutionState` AND bd3.`dataTypeCode` = 'projectExecutionState' LEFT JOIN fnd_department d ON d.`departmentNum` = m.`officeCode` LEFT JOIN fnd_department d2 ON d2.`departmentNum` = m.`userOffice` LEFT JOIN fnd_company c ON c.id = m.compId
<if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.id"> m.id = #projectMaintenance.id# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.projectId"> m.projectId = #projectMaintenance.projectId# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.projectCode"> m.projectCode like concat("%", #projectMaintenance.projectCode#, "%") <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.projectName"> m.projectName like concat("%", #projectMaintenance.projectName#, "%") <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.projectType"> m.projectType = #projectMaintenance.projectType# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.projectExecutionState"> m.projectExecutionState = #projectMaintenance.projectExecutionState# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.contractNo"> m.contractNo = #projectMaintenance.contractNo# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.officeCode"> m.officeCode = #projectMaintenance.officeCode# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.compId"> m.compId = #projectMaintenance.compId# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.type"> m.type = #projectMaintenance.type# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.category"> m.category = #projectMaintenance.category# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.subCategory"> m.subCategory = #projectMaintenance.subCategory# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.processTime"> m.processTime = #projectMaintenance.processTime# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.processDesc"> m.processDesc = #projectMaintenance.processDesc# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.processStep"> m.processStep = #projectMaintenance.processStep# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.remainProblem"> m.remainProblem = #projectMaintenance.remainProblem# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.transitHour"> m.transitHour = #projectMaintenance.transitHour# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.processHour"> m.processHour = #projectMaintenance.processHour# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.itemModel"> m.itemModel = #projectMaintenance.itemModel# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.softVersion"> m.softVersion = #projectMaintenance.softVersion# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.enabledFeatures"> m.enabledFeatures = #projectMaintenance.enabledFeatures# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.hasReport"> m.hasReport = #projectMaintenance.hasReport# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.quesnaireId"> m.quesnaireId = #projectMaintenance.quesnaireId# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.deliverFileIds"> m.deliverFileIds = #projectMaintenance.deliverFileIds# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.remark"> m.remark = #projectMaintenance.remark# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.createTime"> m.createTime = #projectMaintenance.createTime# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.createBy"> m.createBy = #projectMaintenance.createBy# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.updateTime"> m.updateTime = #projectMaintenance.updateTime# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.updateBy"> m.updateBy = #projectMaintenance.updateBy#
<if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.serviceManager"> sm.memberCode = #projectMaintenance.serviceManager# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.programManager"> (pm.memberCode = #projectMaintenance.programManager# or pm2.memberCode = #projectMaintenance.programManager#)
<if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.userPower" open="(" close=")"> (m.createBy = #projectMaintenance.userPower# or sm.memberCode = #projectMaintenance.userPower# or pm.memberCode = #projectMaintenance.userPower# or pm2.memberCode = #projectMaintenance.userPower# <if test=" prepend="or" property="projectMaintenance.checkServicePower" compareValue="true"> exists ( select 1 from serviceManagerPower_$projectMaintenance.userPower$ ep where ep.serviceCode = #projectMaintenance.userPower# AND ep.programCode = m.`createBy` )
) <if test=" prepend="OR" property="projectMaintenance.areaPower"> FIND_IN_SET(m.officeCode, #projectMaintenance.areaPower#)
<if test=" property="projectMaintenance.userPower"> <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.areaPower"> FIND_IN_SET(m.officeCode, #projectMaintenance.areaPower#)
<if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.processStartTime"> m.processTime >= #projectMaintenance.processStartTime# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.processEndTime"> m.processTime <= #projectMaintenance.processEndTime# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.createStartTime"> m.createTime >= #projectMaintenance.createStartTime# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.createEndTime"> m.createTime <= #projectMaintenance.createEndTime#
<if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.warrantyStatus"> m.warrantyStatus = #projectMaintenance.warrantyStatus# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.industryName"> m.industryName = #projectMaintenance.industryName# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.userOffice"> m.userOffice = #projectMaintenance.userOffice# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.year"> m.year = #projectMaintenance.year# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.quarter"> m.quarter = #projectMaintenance.quarter# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.month"> m.month = #projectMaintenance.month# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.wsCount"> m.wsCount = #projectMaintenance.wsCount# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.wafCount"> m.wafCount = #projectMaintenance.wafCount# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.wsYearCount"> m.wsYearCount = #projectMaintenance.wsYearCount# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.wafYearCount"> m.wafYearCount = #projectMaintenance.wafYearCount# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.warrantyInfo"> m.warrantyInfo = #projectMaintenance.warrantyInfo# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.serviceInfo"> m.serviceInfo = #projectMaintenance.serviceInfo# <if test=" property="projectMaintenance.customInfo">
<if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.customInfo.iterator[].value"> #projectMaintenance.customInfo.iterator[].value# = m.customInfo ->> '$$.$projectMaintenance.customInfo.iterator[].key$'
<if test=" hideFiles compareValue="true"> <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.deliverFiles"> (
pd.deliverFiles like concat("%", #projectMaintenance.deliverFiles#, "%") or pd.deliverTypes like concat("%", #projectMaintenance.deliverFiles#, "%") )
<if test=" hideWarranty compareValue="true"> <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.queryWarrantyStatus"> wcs.warrantyStatus = #projectMaintenance.queryWarrantyStatus# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.queryWarrantyGrade"> wcs.warrantyGrade = #projectMaintenance.queryWarrantyGrade# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectMaintenance.queryWafService"> wcs.wafService = #projectMaintenance.queryWafService#
GROUP BY m.id ORDER BY m.id desc <if test=" property="displayParam.offset"> limit #displayParam.offset#, #displayParam.pagesize#
mapper.insert:
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS $quesType$_tempQuesnaireResultLineTable ( KEY id (id), KEY quesnaireId (quesnaireResultHeaderId), KEY quesnaireTemplateHeaderId (quesnaireTemplateHeaderId) ) SELECT qrl.id, qrl.`quesnaireResultHeaderId`, qrl.`questionScore`, qrl.`questionAnswer`, qtl.`quesnaireTemplateHeaderId`, qtl.`questionType`, qtl.`questionTypeForCB`, qtl.`questionNum`, qtl.`questionContent`,
IFNULL(qto.`questionOptionsContent`, qrl.questionAnswer) AS questionOptionsContent FROM `pm_cl_quesnaire_result_line` qrl LEFT JOIN `pm_cl_quesnaire_template_line` qtl ON qtl.`id` = qrl.`quesnaireTemplateLineId` LEFT JOIN `pm_cl_quesnaire_template_header` qth ON qtl.`quesnaireTemplateHeaderId` = qth.id LEFT JOIN `pm_cl_quesnaire_template_options` qto ON qto.`id` = qrl.`questionTemplateOptId` WHERE qth.quesType = #{quesType} ORDER BY qrl.`quesnaireResultHeaderId`, qtl.`questionNum`

CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS $quesType$_tempQuesnaireResultTable ( KEY quesnaireResultHeaderId (quesnaireResultHeaderId) ) SELECT qrt.`quesnaireResultHeaderId` <if test=" tempType compareValue="oneColumn"> <if test=" prepend="," oneColumn> $oneColumn$ AS questionResults
<if test=" tempType compareValue="oneColumn"> <if test=" prepend="," columns> $columns$
FROM $quesType$_tempQuesnaireResultLineTable qrt GROUP BY qrt.`quesnaireResultHeaderId` ORDER BY quesnaireResultHeaderId ASC

CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS temp_maintenance_contractNo ( KEY id (id), KEY contractNo (contractNo) ) SELECT DISTINCT m.`id`, SUBSTRING_INDEX( SUBSTRING_INDEX(m.contractNo, ',', b.id + 1), ',', - 1 ) AS contractNo FROM pm_project_maintenance m LEFT JOIN FIND_IN_SET_HELP b ON b.id < ( LENGTH(m.contractNo) - LENGTH(REPLACE(m.contractNo, ',', '')) + 1 ) WHERE m.`contractNo` > ''
mapper.delete: DROP TEMPORARY TABLE IF EXISTS temp_maintenance_contractNo;
mapper.insert: CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS temp_warranty_state (KEY contractNo (contractNo)) AS SELECT * FROM `view_warranty_contract_state`
mapper.delete: DROP TEMPORARY TABLE IF EXISTS temp_warranty_state;
mapper.sql:
SELECT ph.`projectId`, ph.`projectCode`, ph.`projectName`, pg.projectType, ph.`column001` as officeCode, fd.`departmentName` as officeName, c.name as companyName, c.abbr as companyAbbr, ph.column004 AS marketName, ph.column005 AS systemName, ph.column006 AS expendName, ph.column007 AS industryName, ph.column013 AS finalCustomerName, ph.compId, group_concat(DISTINCT pc.contractNo) as contractNos, IF(SUM(DISTINCT IF(wcs.`diff` = 0, 99, wcs.`diff`)) > 1, 0, SUM(DISTINCT IF(wcs.`diff` = 0, 99, wcs.`diff`))) warrantyStatus, IF(SUM(DISTINCT IF(wcs.`diff` = 0, 99, wcs.`diff`)) = -1, '维保内', IF(SUM(DISTINCT IF(wcs.`diff` = 0, 99, wcs.`diff`)) = 0 OR SUM(DISTINCT IF(wcs.`diff` = 0, 99, wcs.`diff`)) > 1, '部分保外', IF(SUM(DISTINCT IF(wcs.`diff` = 0, 99, wcs.`diff`)) = 1, '维保外', NULL) ) ) AS warrantyStatusName, MIN(wcs.`warrantyStartTime`) AS warrantyStartTime, MAX(wcs.`warrantyEndTime`) AS warrantyEndTime, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(wcs.contractNo, ":", wcs.warrantyStatusName, "(", DATE(wcs.`warrantyStartTime`), "~", DATE(wcs.`warrantyEndTime`), ")") SEPARATOR "
") AS warrantyStatusDesc, MAX(wcs.`warrantyGrade`) warrantyGrade, IF(MAX(wcs.`warrantyGrade`) = 1, '基本维保', IF(MAX(wcs.`warrantyGrade`) = 2, '中级维保', IF(MAX(wcs.`warrantyGrade`) = 3, '高级维保', NULL) ) ) AS warrantyGradeName, MIN(wcs.`warrantyGradeStartTime`) warrantyGradeStartTime, MAX(wcs.`warrantyGradeEndTime`) warrantyGradeEndTime, IF(DATE(NOW()) >= MIN(wcs.`warrantyGradeStartTime`) AND MAX(wcs.`warrantyGradeEndTime`) >= DATE(NOW()), "true", "false") AS warrantyGradeEnable, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT wcs.gradedesc SEPARATOR "
") AS warrantyGradeDesc, IFNULL(MAX(wcs.`wafService`), 0) wafService, IF(MAX(wcs.`wafService`) = 1, "策略调优服务", NULL) AS wafServiceName, MIN(wcs.`wafServiceStartTime`) wafServiceStartTime, MAX(wcs.`wafServiceEndTime`) wafServiceEndTime, IF(DATE(NOW()) >= MIN(wcs.`wafServiceStartTime`) AND MAX(wcs.`wafServiceEndTime`) >= DATE(NOW()), "true", "false") AS wafServiceEnable, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(wcs.itemDesc, "(", DATE(wcs.`wafServiceStartTime`), "~", DATE(wcs.`wafServiceEndTime`), ")") SEPARATOR "
") AS warrantyServiceDesc FROM `pm_project_header` ph LEFT JOIN `pm_project_group_relationship` pgr on ph.`projectCode` = pgr.`projectCode` LEFT JOIN `pm_project_group` pg on pg.`projectGroupCode` = pgr.`projectGroupCode` LEFT JOIN `pm_project_contract` pc on pc.`projectGroupCode` = pgr.`projectGroupCode` LEFT JOIN `view_warranty_contract_state` wcs on wcs.`contractNo` = REPLACE(REPLACE(pc.`contractNo`, "-C", ""), "-L", "") LEFT JOIN fnd_department fd on fd.`departmentNum` = ph.`column001` LEFT JOIN fnd_company c force key(primary) ON c.id = ph.compId WHERE ph.`effectiveTo` is null
mapper.delete: DROP TEMPORARY TABLE IF EXISTS temp_project_warranty_state;
mapper.select: AND ph.projectId = #{projectId};

SELECT COUNT(distinct deliverId) = LENGTH(std.basicDataAttri1) - LENGTH(replace(std.basicDataAttri1, ",", "")) + 1 AS hasQuarterDeliveried FROM `pm_project_maintenance` m LEFT JOIN `pm_basic_deliver_detail` pd ON m.`id` = pd.projectId AND pd.`projectType` = m.`projectType` + 1 INNER JOIN `fnd_basic_data` std ON std.dataTypeCode = 'projectServiceDeliveryType' AND FIND_IN_SET(pd.deliverId, std.basicDataAttri1) WHERE m.projectId = #{projectId} AND std.basicDataId = #{eventKey} <if test=" prepend="AND" uploadTime> year(m.`processTime`) = year(IFNULL(#{uploadTime}, now())) AND quarter(m.`processTime`) = quarter(IFNULL(#{uploadTime}, now()))
GROUP BY m.`projectId`, m.projectType, dataTypeCode

select count(serviceType) as `count`, IFNULL(sum(quarterCount), 0) totalCount, IFNULL(sum(if(year = year(#{serviceDate}) and quarter = quarter(#{serviceDate}), quarterCount, 0)), 0) as quarterCount from (select m.`id`, m.projectId, serviceType, year(IFNULL(pm.processTime, m.processTime)) as year, quarter(IFNULL(pm.processTime, m.processTime)) as quarter, sum(deliveried) as quarterCount from `pm_project_maintenance_service_delivery` m Left join pm_project_maintenance pm on pm.id = m.maintenanceId where m.projectId = #{projectId} and m.`deliveried` = 1 <if test=" prepend="AND" serviceType> m.`serviceType` = #{serviceType} <if test=" startDate> <if test=" endDate> AND IFNULL(pm.processTime, m.processTime) between #{startDate} and #{endDate}
group by m.`projectId`, m.projectType, serviceType, year, quarter) t
mapper.sql:
SELECT std.basicDataId as serviceType, m.`id`, m.projectId, pd.deliverId, deliverableType,
year(m.`processTime`) as year, quarter(m.`processTime`) as quarter, count(deliverId) as quarterCount, count(distinct deliverId) = IFNULL(LENGTH(std.basicDataAttri1) - LENGTH(replace(std.basicDataAttri1, ",", "")), 0) + 1 as hasQuarterDeliveried, LENGTH(std.basicDataAttri1) - LENGTH(replace(std.basicDataAttri1, ",", "")) + 1 as deliverTypeNeedCount FROM `pm_project_maintenance` m LEFT JOIN `pm_basic_deliver_detail` pd ON m.`id` = pd.projectId AND pd.`projectType` = m.`projectType` + 1 INNER JOIN `fnd_basic_data` std ON std.dataTypeCode = 'projectServiceDeliveryType'
AND FIND_IN_SET(pd.deliverId, std.basicDataAttri1) WHERE year(m.`processTime`) = year(IFNULL(#{serviceDate}, now())) AND quarter(m.`processTime`) = quarter(IFNULL(#{serviceDate}, now())) GROUP BY m.`projectId`, m.projectType, serviceType

SELECT serviceType as serviceType, m.id, m.`maintenanceId`, m.projectId, m.projectType, year(IFNULL(pm.processTime, m.processTime)) as year, quarter(IFNULL(pm.processTime, m.processTime)) as quarter, month(IFNULL(pm.processTime, m.processTime)) as month, sum(deliveried) as quarterCount, sum(distinct deliveried) as hasQuarterDeliveried FROM `pm_project_maintenance_service_delivery` m left join pm_project_maintenance pm on m.`maintenanceId` = pm.`id` WHERE year(IFNULL(pm.processTime, m.processTime)) = year(IFNULL(#{serviceDate}, now())) AND quarter(IFNULL(pm.processTime, m.processTime)) = quarter(IFNULL(#{serviceDate}, now())) AND IFNULL(pm.processTime, m.processTime) BETWEEN m.startDate AND m.endDate GROUP BY m.`projectId`, m.projectType, serviceType

<if test=" serviceTypes>
LEFT JOIN (SELECT basicDataId as serviceType, basicDataAttri1 as deliverId FROM `fnd_basic_data` WHERE dataTypeCode = 'projectServiceDeliveryType') st ON 1 = 1
<if test=" hasQuarterDeliveried> LEFT JOIN () sd ON sd.projectId = wcs.projectId AND sd.serviceType = st.serviceType
<if test=" joinProjectMembers> LEFT JOIN pm_project_member sm ON wcs.`projectId` = sm.`projectId` AND wcs.`projectType` = sm.`projectType` AND sm.`memberRole` = '20' AND sm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND sm.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm ON wcs.`projectId` = pm.`projectId` AND wcs.`projectType` = pm.`projectType` AND pm.`memberRole` = '30' AND pm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND pm.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm2 ON wcs.`projectId` = pm2.`projectId` AND wcs.`projectType` = pm2.`projectType` AND pm2.`memberRole` = '30' AND pm2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND pm2.`fromFlag` = 2 LEFT JOIN `pm_project_member` s ON s.`projectId` = wcs.`projectId` AND s.`projectType` = wcs.`projectType` AND s.`memberRole` = "10" AND s.`effectiveTo` IS NULL
<if test=" prepend="AND" serviceTypes>
<if test=" serviceQuarter compareValue="true"> <if test=" serviceDate > ( #{serviceDate} between wcs.`$serviceTypes[]$StartTime` and wcs.`$serviceTypes[]$EndTime` and st.serviceType = #serviceTypes[]# )
<if test=" serviceQuarter compareValue="true"> <if test=" serviceDate >
( CONCAT(YEAR(#{serviceDate}), QUARTER(#{serviceDate})) >= CONCAT(YEAR(wcs.`$serviceTypes[]$StartTime`), QUARTER(wcs.`$serviceTypes[]$StartTime`)) AND CONCAT(YEAR(#{serviceDate}), QUARTER(#{serviceDate})) <= CONCAT(YEAR(wcs.`$serviceTypes[]$EndTime`), QUARTER(wcs.`$serviceTypes[]$EndTime`)) AND st.serviceType = #serviceTypes[]# )
<if test=" prepend="AND" serviceType> st.serviceType = #{serviceType}
<if test=" prepend="AND" warrantyGradeDate> DATE(#{warrantyGradeDate}) BETWEEN wcs.`warrantyGradeStartTime` AND wcs.`warrantyGradeEndTime`
<if test=" prepend="AND" wafServiceDate> DATE(#{wafServiceDate}) BETWEEN wcs.`wafServiceStartTime` AND wcs.`wafServiceEndTime`
<if test=" prepend="AND" projectId> wcs.projectId = #{projectId} <if test=" prepend="AND" projectCode> wcs.projectCode like concat("%", #{projectCode}, "%") <if test=" prepend="AND" projectName> wcs.projectName like concat("%", #{projectName}, "%") <if test=" prepend="AND" contractNo> wcs.contractNos like concat("%", #{contractNo}, "%") <if test=" prepend="AND" officeCode> wcs.officeCode = #{officeCode} <if test=" prepend="AND" compId> wcs.compId = #{compId}
<if test=" prepend="AND" serviceManager> sm.memberCode = #{serviceManager} <if test=" prepend="AND" programManager> (pm.memberCode = #{programManager} or pm2.memberCode = #{programManager})
<if test=" prepend="AND" userPower open="(" close=")"> (sm.memberCode = #{userPower} or pm.memberCode = #{userPower} or pm2.memberCode = #{userPower} <if test=" prepend="or" checkServicePower compareValue="true"> exists ( select 1 from serviceManagerPower_$userPower$ ep where ep.serviceCode = #{userPower} AND ep.programCode = wcs.`createBy` )
) <if test=" prepend="OR" areaPower> FIND_IN_SET(wcs.officeCode, #{areaPower})
<if test=" userPower> <if test=" prepend="AND" areaPower> FIND_IN_SET(wcs.officeCode, #{areaPower})
<if test=" prepend="AND" queryWarrantyStatus> wcs.warrantyStatus = #{queryWarrantyStatus} <if test=" prepend="AND" queryWarrantyGrade> wcs.warrantyGrade = #{queryWarrantyGrade} <if test=" prepend="AND" queryWafService> wcs.wafService = #{queryWafService} <if test=" prepend="AND" hasQuarterDeliveried> #{hasQuarterDeliveried} = IFNULL(sd.hasQuarterDeliveried, FALSE)
mapper.select: select count(*) from temp_project_warranty_state wcs

SELECT wcs.* <if test=" prepend="," serviceTypes> st.*
<if test=" prepend="," joinProjectMembers> sm.`memberName` as serviceManager, pm.`memberName` as programManagerA, pm2.`memberName` as programManagerB, CONCAT(s.`memberCode`, "-", REPLACE(s.`memberName`, CONCAT(s.`memberCode`, "-"), "")) AS salerName
<if test=" prepend="," hasQuarterDeliveried> IFNULL(sd.hasQuarterDeliveried, false) AS hasQuarterDeliveried
FROM temp_project_warranty_state wcs
order by officeCode, projectType, projectId <if test=" property="displayParam.offset"> limit #displayParam.offset#, #displayParam.pagesize#

SELECT ui.`username`, ui.`realName`, ui.`dpNo`, d.`departmentName`, IFNULL(ve.`depLV2Code`, ve.`depLV1Code`) AS depCode, ve.`depAllName`, e.`workNo` AS sectary, e.`name` AS sectaryName, e.`email` AS sectaryEmail, e.`mobile` AS sectaryPhone, ms.`sectary` AS sectary1, ms2.`sectary` AS sectary2 FROM `fnd_user_info` ui LEFT JOIN `pm_project_maintenance_sectary_from_sse` ms ON ms.`depNum` = LEFT(ui.`dpNo`, 6) LEFT JOIN `fnd_department` d ON d.`departmentNum` = ui.`dpNo` LEFT JOIN view_ehr_employee ve ON ve.`workNo` = RIGHT(ui.`username`, 5) LEFT JOIN `pm_project_maintenance_sectary_from_sse` ms2 ON ms2.`depNum` = IFNULL(ve.`depLV2Code`, ve.`depLV1Code`) LEFT JOIN ehr_employee e ON e.`workNo` = IFNULL(ms.`sectary`, ms2.`sectary` ) WHERE ui.`status` = 1 <if test=" prepend="AND" username> ui.username = #{username}
